infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Localo uses the camera to scan products and auto-fill details for your store inventory.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Localo uses your location to show nearby stores and accurate delivery options.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Localo uses the microphone for the voice assistant so you can speak to find products and ask shopkeepers about availability.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Localo uses speech recognition to understand your voice commands and help you find products hands-free.

plugins.cameraPermission: Localo uses the camera to scan products and auto-fill details for your store inventory.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Localo uses your location to show nearby stores and accurate delivery options.

plugins.microphonePermission: Localo uses the microphone so the voice assistant can hear your questions and help you find products.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Localo uses speech recognition so you can speak to the assistant naturally.
